pattern: High frequency login attempts targeting multiple usernames (ubuntu, socdemo)
behavior: Sustained brute force attack attempting multiple credential combinations
attack_flow: Multiple failed logins using invalid users
before_block: Continuous high-volume SSH login attempts across multiple usernames
after_block: SSH traffic from attacker IP stopped after firewall block
notes: Attack shows clear brute force pattern with username enumeration followed by password attempts. Activity sustained over time and escalated in intensity.
